title: Anila's Peppa Pig Bubble Tubs with Wands, 60ml Solution & Maze Lid, Set of 12, Party Bag Fillers & Favours, Ages 3+
features: Incredible Fun: Anila's 12 Peppa Pig Bubble Tubs provide endless entertainment for children aged 3 and above with captivating bubble wands and a 60ml bubble solution.
Party Favours: These bubble tubs make perfect party bag fillers and favours, ensuring a memorable experience for all.
Outdoor Delight: Enjoy outdoor fun with these bubble tubs, creating enchanting bubble displays in the fresh air.
Maze Lid Design: Each tub features a unique maze lid, adding an extra layer of excitement and challenge.
Compact Size: With a compact design, these bubble tubs are easy to carry and store, making them ideal for travel or outdoor adventures.
